hero.title: Hey, I'm Jonas. I break things in my {homelab}.
hero.subtitle: I love networking, servers, and tinkering with infrastructure.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph_1: I'm Jonáš. IT isn't just my field of study—it's been my passion since childhood.
about.paragraph_2: I've been running my own homelab for over four years. I love experimenting, trying out new things, and learning by doing. I'm currently studying {strong} and I'm eager to finally bridge the gap between academic theory and real-world practice.
about.paragraph_3: I'm currently looking for a job in IT, whether it involves {strong}. If you're looking for someone to join your team, don't hesitate to get in touch.
about.paragraph_3_strong: networking, server administration, or user support

contact.title: Contact
contact.paragraph: Whether you need someone for networking, server administration, or IT support, or you just want to chat about why Hyper-V is better than Proxmox 😉, feel free to reach out.
